category.scope_note: Wireless and IoT radio devices including Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, and cellular-enabled products exported from China to Azerbaijan, covering ICTA type approval and AzStandard (AZS) conformity requirements under Azerbaijan's national regulatory system.

title.en: China-to-Azerbaijan Wireless / IoT Device Compliance Gap Matrix (ICTA / AzStandard)
title.zh: 中国无线/物联网设备进入阿塞拜疆：ICTA / AzStandard合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國無線/物聯網裝置進入亞塞拜然：ICTA / AzStandard合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China wireless and IoT device documentation against Azerbaijan requirements under ICTA (Information and Communications Technologies Agency of Azerbaijan — the national telecom regulatory authority) and AzStandard (Azerbaijan Standards Institute), covering ICTA radio type approval under the Law on Telecommunications (2005), AzStandard (AZS) conformity for radio equipment and electromagnetic compatibility, electrical safety for the 220 V/50 Hz European-plug (Type C/F) grid, local importer and authorised distributor requirements, and Azerbaijan cybersecurity obligations under CERT.AZ and the Law on Information Security. Azerbaijan is not a member of the Eurasian Economic Union (EAEU); it operates an independent national regulatory system with CIS heritage. Chinese CCC, SRRC, and CE documentation are not recognised and do not substitute for ICTA approvals.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国无线及物联网设备文件与阿塞拜疆ICTA（阿塞拜疆信息和通信技术署——国家电信监管机构）及AzStandard（阿塞拜疆标准化研究院）要求的差距对照，涵盖《电信法》（2005年）下的ICTA无线电型号核准、无线电设备及电磁兼容的AzStandard（AZS）合规、220V/50Hz欧标插头（C/F型）电气安全、当地进口商及授权经销商要求，以及CERT.AZ和《信息安全法》下的阿塞拜疆网络安全义务。阿塞拜疆不是欧亚经济联盟（EAEU）成员国，实行具有独联体传统的独立国家监管体系。中国CCC、SRRC及CE文件不被承认，不可替代ICTA核准。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國無線及物聯網裝置文件與亞塞拜然ICTA（亞塞拜然信息和通信技術署——國家電信監管機構）及AzStandard（亞塞拜然標準化研究院）要求的差距對照，涵蓋《電信法》（2005年）下的ICTA無線電型號核准、無線電設備及電磁相容的AzStandard（AZS）合規、220V/50Hz歐標插頭（C/F型）電氣安全、當地進口商及授權經銷商要求，以及CERT.AZ和《信息安全法》下的亞塞拜然網路安全義務。亞塞拜然不是歐亞經濟聯盟（EAEU）成員國，實行具有獨聯體傳統的獨立國家監管體系。中國CCC、SRRC及CE文件不被承認，不可替代ICTA核准。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, customs determination, or market-access approval. Azerbaijan's regulatory frameworks for wireless devices are subject to change, and enforcement practices may differ from published rules. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current requirements with qualified regulatory professionals and the relevant authorities (ICTA, AzStandard, CERT.AZ) before shipment.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、海关裁定或市场准入批准。阿塞拜疆无线设备监管框架可能有所变化，实际执法可能与已发布规定存在差异。出口商、进口商和经销商在出货前，应与合格监管专业人士及相关主管机构（ICTA、AzStandard、CERT.AZ）核验现行要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、海關裁定或市場准入批准。亞塞拜然無線設備監管框架可能有所變化，實際執法可能與已發布規定存在差異。出口商、進口商和經銷商在出貨前，應與合格監管專業人士及相關主管機構（ICTA、AzStandard、CERT.AZ）核驗現行要求。

answer_first.en: Wireless devices entering Azerbaijan require ICTA type approval (conformity certificate/registration) for all radio and telecommunications terminal equipment under the Law on Telecommunications (2005). EMC and radio equipment conformity against AzStandard (AZS) national standards — many adopted from GOST, IEC, and ETSI — is required separately. Electrical safety testing against AZS standards (aligned with IEC 62368-1) is needed for the 220 V/50 Hz European-plug (Type C/F) grid. A local authorised importer or distributor registered in Azerbaijan is mandatory. Azerbaijan is not an EAEU member and has its own national regulatory system; Chinese CCC, SRRC, and CE documentation are not recognised and do not substitute for ICTA approvals. Cybersecurity obligations under CERT.AZ and the Law on Information Security apply to connected devices.
answer_first.zh: 进入阿塞拜疆的无线设备须依据《电信法》（2005年）取得ICTA型号核准（合格证书/注册），适用于所有无线电及电信终端设备。还须分别满足AzStandard（AZS）国家标准（多参照GOST、IEC和ETSI制定）对无线电设备及电磁兼容的合规要求。需对应220V/50Hz欧标插头（C/F型）电网按AZS标准（与IEC 62368-1接轨）进行电气安全测试。须有在阿塞拜疆注册的当地授权进口商或经销商。阿塞拜疆不是EAEU成员国，实行独立国家监管体系；中国CCC、SRRC及CE文件不被承认，不可替代ICTA核准。联网设备须遵守CERT.AZ和《信息安全法》规定的网络安全义务。
answer_first.zht: 進入亞塞拜然的無線設備須依據《電信法》（2005年）取得ICTA型號核准（合格證書/登記），適用於所有無線電及電信終端設備。還須分別滿足AzStandard（AZS）國家標準（多參照GOST、IEC和ETSI制定）對無線電設備及電磁相容的合規要求。需對應220V/50Hz歐標插頭（C/F型）電網按AZS標準（與IEC 62368-1接軌）進行電氣安全測試。須有在亞塞拜然登記的當地授權進口商或經銷商。亞塞拜然不是EAEU成員國，實行獨立國家監管體系；中國CCC、SRRC及CE文件不被承認，不可替代ICTA核准。聯網設備須遵守CERT.AZ和《信息安全法》規定的網路安全義務。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be set to true.
